reviews.review_description:
I’ve been playing Wands for just over 18months and I love this game!!

 it’s just Magical, with a Lovely community on Discord  where I have made some lovely online “friends”.

Not only that, the developers are always updating the game and listen to what people are saying in the Discord “Suggestions” section. 

I have spoken to people from all over the world, which has made duelling so much fun, thanks to the game’s in-game voice chat option. 

Well done CORTOPIA! 👏👏👏 Keep up the fantastic work!!🥰

reviews.review_title: The Mage Experience You've Always Wanted
reviews.review_description: The title is self explanatory. With over 30 spells, this game is the best Harry Potter simulator you're gonna find for awhile.
I was expecting more open arenas and more of a group battle and not 1v1s
I want a refund I don’t like the game the game glitches.
Would’ve been better with a story mode
The game is broken, it rotates my character in circles when I didn’t press the button so I’m just spinning around and can’t cast any spell and they won’t except a refund, complete waste of 20$

When I first bought this game years ago, I thought it would be a hit. The idea of being able to be a Wizard in VR was absolutely outstanding to me. At first it relatively was nice but you could barely get in matches with players. That was 2 years ago and now the game is completely dead. I tried again recently to see if anyone still did the 1v1s and not a single person was online. The developers have also chose to abandon the game and it has been left for scraps. It was a great concept but poorly advertised and executed.
Boring don't play it anymore
It so boring I bought it for 10 seconds and got bored
It's not what I expected it's not that fun you get bored really quick do not recommend also if you want to play with a different person it will most like put the same person back to play with you
Goid gam
It’s just not right

Haven’t gotten a chance to play yet because it’s in Chinese or something…. There is no settings to change it… S.O.S. 

Yes, I have already uninstalled it twice!!!!  :( 

Any help would be lovely thank you!

developer_response.body: Hey hannahhhb. You must have accidentally changed the language to Chinese during setup! Just send us an email at support@cortopia.com, and we'll give you detailed instructions with pictures showing how to find the language setting in the options and change it back to English

reviews.review_description: This game weak
Great from one hand to both hand 1v1. Looking forward to 3v3

It's a cool concept, yet I can only match with one player, who is a way higher level level I am, and I can't win, as no matter what I do, they just block. And for some reason, I can't refund it, even though I haven't played for that long. Don't get it.

developer_response.body: Hey RaeveMaster. Sorry that you didn't happen to find any opponents near your skill level. Fortunately, new players are joining all the time. You can see who is waiting for an opponent right now at www.wandsgame.com. We don't have any control over the refund process, so if you still want to refund the game, we recommend contacting Oculus Support. Thanks.

reviews.review_description: This is the worst game I’ve ever played I rely want my money back

developer_response.body: We're really sad to hear that, shadowshark123673. If you have any feedback for us about how the game could be better, we'd love to hear it at support@cortopia.com. Refunds are handled through Oculus. You can find detailed instructions on the Oculus support site.

reviews.review_description: Fantastic gameplay and very addictive!

developer_response.body: We're glad to hear that you're enjoying the game, oGUYo!

reviews.review_description: For some reason it only reads in another language and you can’t change it. Super frustrating

developer_response.body: Hey tanyaanngreen. It sounds like you may have accidentally changed the language from English to something else the first time you started the game. You can change it back to English in the Workshop on the blackboard. For more detailed instructions with pictures, please reach out to us at support@cortopia.com. Thanks!

reviews.review_title: Couldn't get out of the first hall
reviews.review_description: How do I receive a refund

developer_response.body: Hey Maxginge. You can leave the Practice Hall by selecting the ladder or by opening the menu and choosing the option to leave. If you still want a refund, those are handled through Oculus. You can find detailed instructions on the Oculus support site.

reviews.review_title: I'm sure this is a good game
reviews.review_description: I currently can't play this I would like to get my money back if possible please don't thank you

developer_response.body: Hey kaffienne. Sorry to hear that. We can help you with whatever issue is preventing you from playing, or we can help guide you through the refund process. Please contact us at support@cortopia.com. Thanks.

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE: Ok. I hear that, but what if I want to duel a specific player?  Like my wife who also has a headset AND wands?  Like, can’t we just somehow add a friend to play with?



Even if you’re new (like me) you can still play and learn how to use your wands and defense techniques in easy mode till you feel more confident. Love that it’s multi player but I haven’t figured out how to do that yet. Any suggestions?

developer_response.body: Hey joykat123! To start a multiplayer game, just press Start Duel and wait for an opponent. You can duel the AI while you wait. And you can also join us on Discord to find opponents and participate in our community-run tournaments :)  www.discord.gg/wands

reviews.review_description: I bought the game thinking it was going to be more interesting  and have more choices of modes. But all they have is dueling and practice . Worst decision ever

developer_response.body: Hey badblade11221. If there's anything on the Oculus store page or anywhere else that made you think the game was something that it isn't, please let us know at support@cortopia.com so we can fix the issue. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: I guess it's good if you like nothing but Duels against other players that constantly and almost immediately kill you.  No story, no adventure, just duels.  It's either for you or it's not.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that, Dawnofman. We have a great community of friendly players at www.discord.gg/wands who would be happy to practice with you!

reviews.review_description: Hard to understand the game.  Not enough of instruction during the game!! If I had motioned in time would have gotten a refund..

developer_response.body: Hey trailortrashus. You can find lots of friendly veteran players on the Wands Discord who would be more than happy to show you the ropes. www.discord.gg/wands

reviews.review_description: Complete crap

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying the game. If you have any constructive feedback, we'd love to hear it! You can reach us at support@cortopia.com. Thanks

reviews.review_description: While the premise of the game is interesting and the graphics are well done, it feels like a game that was built from a console mindset rather than starting from what sets VR apart. You pretty much move around by teleportation and the pace of needing to move to different spaces to avoid attacks is such that you do that a lot. Sadly, it’s not an open map so you can only hop to specific spots in the map. I hope to have reason to up rate this app after the developers tap into the full potential of VR platforms like Quest 2.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, arcktip. The game was designed from the ground up for VR. The teleport mechanic at the core of the game helps prevent motion sickness that's common with other kinds of locomotion. You can also avoid attacks by dodging in your physical environment.

reviews.review_description: It's not worth the money. You can't walk around, you teleport and point and use one of the four spells you can use at a time to hit your opponent.  Idk some people might like it but it's not for me.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that it's not your cup of tea, Mojometalhead55. But just so you know, you're free to walk around in your playspace, and can cast two spells simultaneously if you use the Dual Wand control scheme.

reviews.review_description:
That’s it. Waste of my money.
You guys could of made it better in making your player able to move around an arena. I bet people don’t play this because of that exact reason. Of the combat was more interesting like Blaston I’d play it. Blaston is $10, way better physics, bigger player base, and constantly updated.

developer_response.body: You can use the trigger to teleport around the arenas and behind your opponent!

reviews.review_description: All you do is teleport around shoot stuff at the enemy. If I could get a refund I would do it without any hesitation

developer_response.body: Hey jespergg_cg. As long as you haven't played for more than two hours and haven't owned the game for more than two weeks, you can get a refund from Oculus. As far as the game itself, only 11 of the 25 spells are projectiles. The other spells are for defense, utility, summoning, and other purposes, so there's a lot more to do than just teleport around and shoot stuff!

reviews.review_description: Fun 1v1 game with cool spells and customization. Lots of potential to be even better and better. Awesomme

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, Gabe7sanchez!

reviews.review_title: would prefer if told me it was a pvp gam
reviews.review_description: i dont like pvp, especially in games where the highest level player or best vr person has the upper hand . would refund if could

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, Madthan. Sorry to hear that you aren't enjoying the game. There is an AI to duel, but it sounds like you were looking for a different kind of game. If anything on the store page is misleading, please let us know, because we want to fix it. You can contact us at support@cortopia.com. Thanks.

reviews.review_title: Meh, honestly not a very good game
reviews.review_description: Meh its okay.

developer_response.body: Hey, Ch0c0lat3Thund3r. If you have time, please let us know what we could have done to earn more than one star from you. Thanks

reviews.review_description: This game is super boring. There is no good way to put it this game sucks. The wand mechanics are broken. U only cast 4 spells. Long story short DON’T BUY IT!!!

developer_response.body: Hey, XCGod8256. A small number of spells are available to new players, but you'll quickly unlock more. There are a total of 25 spells in the game

reviews.review_description: so I have a few reasons I love this game. One, it's based on strategy. Strategy games are my jam. Also, MAGIC! Hagrid would be proud. Still waiting for him to burst through my door and say, "your a wizard." Any day now. Anyhow. The way you unlock spells as you go is really well done. You don't even get a token by winning or losing, just by playing long enough. Also the cosmetics. OH the cosmetics! You don't have to pay money to get the cosmetics in fact, there isn't any way to pay money at all! And you get dust really quickly i only played for about a total of 2 and a half hours and am almost a third of the way into getting the most expensive skin, and only have 5 spells left to unlock! Each spell has its own use and gimmicks and if you play your cards right, any spell can be super deadly. The way some were designed to go with other spells was done very well. Like the Phoenix and devils spit is an incredible combo and it keeps destroying me, but a good counter for that combo is the shield that covers your whole body (idk the names) it uses your mana quick though so you gotta time it right. Now i do have one complaint. There isn't a story mode! I could imagine a story mode working so well for this game. Developers if your reading this, make it happen!

reviews.review_title: Ok but needs alot of improvement
reviews.review_description: So I started to play the game and I really liked it, but when I found out I couldn’t walk in game that kinda sucked and was very sad. Also it isn’t about skill or how fast or quick you are it’s just who has the batter spells and who is just better at the game. Plus mana in the game needs to be extended or you have less costs on mana.

developer_response.body: Hey DomCody55. Thanks for the feedback. The update that came out today officially makes the game room scale, so you can move around more freely. However the game isn't about walking around, and it never will be, it's about skillful dodging and strategic teleporting. Regarding the mana suggestion, I think you have a really good point!!

reviews.review_description:
I was looking for the Wizard game. & this is nothing like what I wanted. There's only one profile, so IF there was a tutorial & my kid watched it, then I completely missed out on it. I played a few rounds against the AI and I really don't like this game. It took me forever to try playing it & now it's probably too late to get a refund but I really want one. 

Out of all the games I've bought for Oculus Quest, this is the only game I sincerely regret buying & I wish I could undo

developer_response.body: You can restart the tutorial from blackboards in the Workshop. Just click on "Options" then "Reset Tutorial"

reviews.review_description: You buy a game and they fail to tell you no one plays it. And since it’s in a bundle you can’t return it. I’m honestly going to return my quest and stay away from VR till they stop peddling crappy games.

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear that, Hunshi. We just released a new update that makes the AI way more fun to duel, so you can give that a try. And right now, there are lots of people dueling! It sounds like you were online at an unlucky time. We hope you can give the game another chance.

reviews.review_title: Be wary of multiplayer vr games
reviews.review_description:
I was really excited for this game. Turned it on and ran through the tutorial, only to find out that the primary mode is multiplayer (an oversight on my research before buying.) With most games, a primarily multiplayer game is fine, even if you dont have friends to play it with u. Well, in the current state of VR, the odds of you matchmaking with someone else playing that same game at the same time in a region close enough to have a good connection, are very low, due to the low of amount of people that own vr systems. So with that in mind, don't buy this game if u expect to be able to just hit Play in multiplayer and instantly find an opponent. I sat there for half an hour and found no one.

There is a AI match you can play that yields actual exp like normal matches, but I'm not really into that. It's very unfortunate the developers can't do anything about not having players to play against.

developer_response.body: Wands has a strong playerbase for VR. Fortunately, it's easy to find opponents during peak hours, but it's true that there are times when it's difficult to find an opponent. The AI helps fill the gap, but since you're not into that, you can check out the Wands Discord, at www.discord.gg/wands, where you'll usually be able to arrange a match with someone.

reviews.review_description: Just not that great for the price.
Game sucks

reviews.review_title: PvP only + tiny community = no game :(
reviews.review_description:
The actual gameplay is strictly PvP only— the AI is nothing more than target practice. 

There's nothing to do in the PvP lobby but stand there. I waited for a few minutes with no indication that I'd ever get a game. Then I came here and saw there's a website that reports how many games are active. As I write this, that's zero games. 

There may be a player base in some time zones, for players with some schedule. I don't know. All I know is I have a game in my library I'll probably never get to play.

To the devs: I'm rooting for you! It looks like you did an awesome job. The atmosphere is great, the spellcasting mechanics look fun. I bet figuring out the meta would be a blast. I just can't give stars to a game that's literally unplayable for me.

developer_response.body:
Update: We've significantly improved the AI and added difficulty selection. If you feel like giving the game another shot, be sure to challenge the new AI. I think you'll find that it's much more than just target practice now :)

If you're looking for opponents but can't find any random players online at the time, you can usually find someone to duel on our Discord server at www.discord.gg/wands

reviews.review_description: I thought it will do play shooter and RPG. So just a simple shooter to AI and dual. That all. Pffft.
It take up to 30 minutes to get into a match. How can you have a multiplayer game without an active community? I wish I could refund it, although it is too late.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that. Sounds like you got unlucky. Wait times are usually much shorter than that. You can check https://www.wandsgame.com/ongoing-matches/ to see if anyone is waiting for an opponent right now.

reviews.review_description: Is there no way to prevent a new level 2 or 3 from being placed up agianst a veteran player or is the game just like that wpuld be willing to change my review if this hets fixed otherwise its staying at one star

developer_response.body: There is a skill-based matchmaking system, so if there are other players near your skill level who are also looking for an opponent, you'll get matched up with them instead of the veterans. However, if there aren't any players near your skill level looking for an opponent, you'll eventually get matched up with whoever happens to be waiting, regardless of how skilled they are. We decided that was a better option than extending wait times indefinitely. For new players, matches against experienced players are unranked, so they don't have an incentive to go hard on you. A lot of them enjoy chatting with new players and helping them learn the ropes!

reviews.review_description: No player movement except for teleporting??? Only 4 spells???  I thought this game would involve some type of skill. Instead it’s just choosing a spell with a joy stick and hitting a button. I was dying to leave this game after 2 rounds. How did this win any kind of award??? I thought there would be some kind of movement necessary. I’m getting so disappointed in the “new” content for the quest. This game doesn’t even compare to dead and buried or drop dead or even sairento. At least you get to do SOMETHING in those games. This is absolute crap. I expected more from new content on this system and quite frankly this kind of garbage is making me second guess buying the system entirely

developer_response.body:
We're sad to hear that you were disappointed, Dzeeg. I need to correct a few things to avoid any misunderstandings for people who read your review: 
1) You can physically move around within a 3 meter (9.8 foot) area, which allows you to physically dodge attacks. 
2) There are 26 spells in the game, not 4. You can only have 4 in your wands at one time, but you're free to change spells between duels.
3) This game's skill ceiling is very high. People who have been playing for years are still discovering new ways to improve.

reviews.review_description:
After just a few minutes of playing this game you are in an amazing experience. Then you start to play the game where you’ll duel opponents. There after many times of trying haven’t been one online person. I had to play against AI which is very boring. The controls are ok kind of wonky. However you just stand there with you arm pointed outwards you can’t swing it around for most spells either. You just stand there doing the same spell over and over again. If they plan on fixing the wand controls. If they add cross platform multiplayer then this game might be better. Until then I’m sorry it’s not for me or foe most people. Great job to the developer though. Just needs a little more something to make it worth 20. 

-VR Reporter

developer_response.body:
Hey, SuperDuperAidan. We're currently evaluating different controls schemes for Quest, since that's been a really common suggestion. We're also planning to add difficulty options for the AI, so it will be more fun to duel for skilled players. Update: We've introduced a brand new (and much more intuitive) control scheme in the latest update :)

We've already added cross-platform multiplayer to the game, but you must have been online at an unlucky time. You can check the Ongoing Matches page at www.wandsgame.com to see who is playing right now.

We hope to earn a better review from you after the next update, if you'll give the game another shot!

reviews.review_description: I am not a gamer but I bought Oculus Quest because the VR is awesome and I think its the interface of the future. I bought Wands because the concept for the game is really cool. But the longer I play the less fun it is. I am trying, and I thonk Im getting better, but the AI is getting better faster. I cant win ever, anymore. When I lose match after match I should not be getting promoted and the AI should not be getting harder to defeat. The game is practically worthless to me and I never got any good at it. I tried against real players and they kicked my axe so I know I need to practice against the AI. But all it does is stomp me too now. Please fix the AI so players on a slower learning curve can play too.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback, Slooperopols. We'll look into adding an option to change the AI's difficulty.

Update: We've added a difficulty selection for the AI, so you don't need to worry about it getting too good too fast. The easiest version of the AI is now available to duel whenever you'd like!

reviews.review_description: Great game to get your wizard duel on. It takes practice to manage your mana and movements, but it's fun and so rewarding when you get those wins.

I started playing VR a few weeks ago and I was really enjoying it; I bought this game a few days ago and now I’m LOVING it.
Unlike other VR games that are fun to play around with every now and then, this game gets you invested in creating and testing new builds and strategies. I like to think of it as the perfect cross between Chess and DotA2/League of Legends, where you get to live out your Harry Potter fantasy in VR.
I get easily sick of games where it feels like you’re just going through the motions over and over again, but the number of possible spell combos and the ability to play against other human beings keeps you on your toes and excited for every duel. The AI improves as you do, making it a sufficient opponent to practice against. I also love that dueling other people is a no-stakes activity; every loss is just an experience to learn from. Matches are only 3.5 minutes max, so if you’re getting stomped it’s no big deal.
The game play takes a little getting used to, and finding a build that works for you takes some experimental effort - but once you’ve got the hang of things, you’ll find this is one of the best VR experiences out there. I highly recommend checking out “Magic VR” on YouTube; he has some great videos with some advice to help you get started. As mentioned by other people in reviews, it would be great to have something to do while waiting to be matched up with a dueling opponent, and obviously the more spells and courses, the better!
Props to the developers, you guys did a fantastic job!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the amazing review and feedback! If you haven't already, we'd love for you to join our community at www.discord.gg/wands!

reviews.review_description: It is very cool I suck at it but it is a very good game

developer_response.body: Thanks, grim_reaper20087! Keep practicing and you'll be a pro in no time!

reviews.review_title: Good game just not what I expected
reviews.review_description: It's a great game don't get me wrong but the player base is tiny

developer_response.body: Hey A10dency2noob. If you're having trouble finding an opponent, you can check https://www.wandsgame.com/ongoing-matches/ to see who is currently playing.

reviews.review_description: Hello

I have been waiting for this release ever since i heard of it and let me tell you right now, this game? Lived up to the hype!!!! If you are on the fence about getting this gem, don't think, just buy!!! So far i only have 3 hours played but the replayability is phenomenal! There is a wand progression system and new charecters to unlock! 6 maps (hopefully more to come) and tournaments! The soundtrack is fitting and this is probably the best quest game i own right now! My only problem is the matchmaking. There is no way to invite specific friends to a game. And i found a bug where if you join a friends party via oculus menu and try to play a private match, there is no player audio. And if you leave the party, unless you reboot the whole game, you wont hear them. Other than that, the devs have givin us the best pvp/competitive wizard dueling game i have ever played. Please please support these guys and pick up this awesome game!!!! 5/5 for me :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the wonderful feedback and for the bug report!

reviews.review_description: Love the game. Very exciting and love the idea. Would like different levels of ai difficulty to practice on but so good. Love to see more maps come out too

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, AdjunxLynx. Different AI difficulty levels is definitely a good idea.

reviews.review_description: Good game, but having issues that it gets stuck after a match. Happened multiple times already

developer_response.body: We'll look into it, DrFaruqi!

reviews.review_title: Graphics are cool, but no story
reviews.review_description: Great if you're looking for arena play. But would be great if there were missions or goals. Requesting refund.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that, Jball-2020. Please let us know if you have any issues claiming your refund.

reviews.review_description: Finally some decent graphic for quest. Though I don't really like the game and not many people online

developer_response.body: We're glad you like the graphics! You can usually find opponents at discord.gg/wands if nobody is waiting in the queue.

reviews.review_description: Resetting your position set you behind and to the left slightly, which means you have to walk back to the center. Otherwise, great game with awesome multiplayer!

developer_response.body: Did you recenter with the Oculus button or with the X button? Recentering with the X button should always return you to the center of your tile

reviews.review_description:
In this game you play a witch who lives in the underground of magic. Peripheral lore tells you that Magic is hunted and frowned upon in society, and that being discovered is a quick way to a fiery death. However, using portals to pocket dimensions, witches can duel each other for power and practice their magic safely. 

And that all you do, you engage in duels against other spell casters in various arenas, unlocking spells as you do, and creating a magic strategy to defeat your foes. The controls are intuitive, the magic is creative and unrestricted in most ways, the art design is engaging, and the level designs are more than they appear in most cases, and are, importantly, unique from each other. 

The scope here is narrow but well executed. People will complain about the matchmaking, but this is mostly due to the currently limited player base, not the fault of the programs or the Devs. But, again, the scope is narrow.

Aside from customizing your witch, customizing your spells, and customizing your wand appearance, you will be doing one thing and one thing only, dueling other witches. And that is the only place this game falls short. To see these mechanics used in a narrative, even a railroaded narrative, would be sublime. 

The Core Components for something out of this world have clearly been assembled by the Dev team. My only fear is that they may stop stirring the cauldron too soon.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the amazing review and detailed feedback, WiseScryer! We really appreciate it. And we're still stirring the cauldron...
